texto: White people couldn't do black music back in the day because they weren't funky or bad enough. They weren't from the ghettoes, but hip-hop and R&B changed all of that because white kids want to be down with it. They wanted to learn it so they studied the culture. It's kind of a cool thing because we shouldn't be so separate.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Narada Michael Walden sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “White people couldn't do black music back in the day because they weren't funky or bad enough. Th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, music, day, útil em momentos de mudanca e day.

frase_original: White people couldn't do black music back in the day because they weren't funky or bad enough. They weren't from the ghettoes, but hip-hop and R&B changed all of that because white kids want to be down with it. They wanted to learn it so they studied the culture. It's kind of a cool thing because we shouldn't be so separate.
